news.title: Our Future
news.Author: GlideClient Team
news.subtitle: Whats next???
news.body: We are aware that many of you are waiting anxiously for the next update to GlideClient, and if you aren't in our discord you wont know even what we are working on... We have been working on a new main menu system, patching bugs, making the client more stable and adding new settings. We understand that the wait is frustrating however we are a small team, and we have real life stuff going on so development isnt going as fast as we would like, but we hope to get 7.3 ready quite soon, thanks for your patience, you guys are amazing for continuing to use Glide despite our terrible release schedule.

news.title: Glide Client 7.2
news.Author: GlideClient Team
news.subtitle: We have released GlideClient 7.2.
news.body: Today we are proud to announce that we are releasing GlideClient as a public release, we would like to thank everyone that participated in the GlideClient betas and we hope you will enjoy using the latest iteration of our client.

news.title: Glide Client Beta.
news.Author: BreadCat
news.subtitle: We have released GlideClient as a beta.
news.body: Today we are happy to say we have finaly released GlideClient into public beta, with this we expect there to be bugs however we have tried to ensure that the client is usable. We are looking forward to hearing user reactions to the glide beta and want to thank for using Glide.

news.title: The new news section.
news.Author: GlideClient
news.subtitle: The news from Glide.
news.body: We are testing the new news feature, here we will send announcements you can see straight from the client to stay updated about what we are working on!
